note: Seeded compliance violations in sample-app. Used ONLY by the eval suite to measure audit precision and recall. The auditing agent must never see this file. acceptableRequirementIds lists the unit ids that count as a correct match (rent-slab violations may cite any DEC43-2013/ART-1 clause).

violations.description: maxIncreaseFraction uses wrong slab thresholds and caps at 25%, exceeding the decree's 20% ceiling.
AMENDMENT_NOTICE_DAYS is 30; Article 14 requires no less than 90 days.
EVICTION_NOTICE_MONTHS is 3; Article 25(2) requires 12 months' notice.
The eviction notice is not required to be served via notary public or registered mail, which Article 25(2) mandates.
violations.note: Omission-type violation; harder to detect. Tests recall on missing requirements.

violations.description: activateLease and isEnforceable treat a lease as valid without an Ejari registration number, contrary to Article 4's registration requirement.
